title: Zafar_AI_Mission_Statement_with_Leaders_and_Plan
snippet: 🚀 Personal Statement — My AI Dream I've decided to go all-in on Artificial Intelligence — because it's the future, and I want to be one of the leaders in it. AI is where cool ideas, big money, and real impact come together. It's not just about coding robots — it's about changing the world. I’m building my path step by step. I’ll take part in school olympiads, hackathons, AI forums like AIJ, and company events. I want to bring pride to my school and my family, and take my skills to the top level. My dream is to create smart projects that help people and make money too — real, multi-million idea

title: Zafar_PSAT_Bilingual_Commitment
snippet: 📘 PSAT Preparation Plan and Commitment — Inspired by MASTER EDUCATION 🎯 Goal Score 1400+ on the PSAT and receive an official certificate by the end of 2025. 🧠 Key Principles (Based on Aysana's Experience) - Focus on quality over quantity: understand your mistakes and correct them. - Stick to a strict routine and daily discipline. - Build reading and vocabulary skills actively. - Practice with real SAT materials from 2020–2024. - Engage with community chats and support systems. 📅 Daily & Weekly Schedule (3-Month Plan) 🕔 Morning (5:00–7:30) - 45 min – SAT Reading (annotate texts, analyze answers

title: Автономный ученик
snippet: ПРОЕКТ «АВТОНОМНЫЙ УЧЕНИК» Предлагаю на сегодняшней встрече использовать все возможности, чтобы удерживать внимание на нескольких задачах и условиях одновременно. Начнем с того, что представим происходящее как командный турнир по шахматам. Вы играете на своей доске, но успех команды и ваш зависит от того, что происходит на трех досках одновременно. В командной игре заложены разные возможности: - командный результат превыше всего, в игре делается ставка на мастерство и слаженность; каждый игрок подчинен общему замыслу; - игроки не всегда следуют командной стратегии, иногда недопонимают ее, иног

title: Term_Report_1_25-26_academic_year_AS_Khamidov_Zafar_2025-12-27
snippet: LET OVO SCHOOL Term Report 1 25-26 academic year PREP ARED: DECEMBER 27, 2025 Term 1 2025 - 2026 STUDENT NAME Zafar Khamidov GRADE AS ADVISOR Anna Zolkina LETTER Dear BP1s, This semester started off with the proverbial bang; you all expected to study in the DP and overnight, we together became the BP. This was a significant change, yet you adapted to this new system with impressive speed and a wonderfully positive attitude which I commend you for.
